title: Xtra Crumbly American Suet Casserole
description: A savory, crumbly American dish featuring suet, perfect for meal prep, and made in a terracotta dish. This Jain-friendly recipe is a delicious option for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the suet, flour, baking powder, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, mix the blanched and chopped onion, carrot, and green beans.
Add the vegetable mixture to the suet mixture and stir until just combined.
Transfer the mixture to a terracotta dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 35 minutes, or until the casserole is golden brown and set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
